name: Country Vegetable Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Saute mushrooms in butter. Reserve a small amount for garnish.
3. Spoon remaining mushrooms into the crust.
4. Saute zucchini, carrots, onion, and garlic.
5. Spoon over the mushrooms.
6. Combine eggs, 1 cup cheese, half & half, sour cream, thyme, and nutmeg.
7. Pour over the vegetables.
8. Top with the remaining 1/2 cup cheese.
9. Sprinkle with paprika.
10. Bake for 40-45 minutes.
11. Cool for 10 minutes before slicing.
12. Garnish reserved mushrooms.
13. Serve with a crisp salad and dry white wine.
